type.description: Optional event classifier. 'invalidation' marks a ledger line that explicitly revokes/stales a previously-good claim (use with status 'revoked' or 'stale'). 'verification' is the default assertion of a status. Surface treats an invalidation event as terminal for the claim.

resolvesDispute.description: ADR 0003 §8: marks this event as an authority-weighted dispute-resolution decision.

authorityRef.description: ADR 0003 §8: the AuthorityTrace.authorityRef the deciding actor invokes.
